name: Sebek Zigvolt || The Cult of the Moors
description:
[ Twisted Wonderland ] You were crying in the woods when a strange man stumbles upon you and acts rather… strange. Will you go with him to his odd community?

Sebek cult bot!! Maybe I’ll make Mal/Lilia/silver in the future. The concept of Diasomnia being a cult is so cool to me.
creator: Raccoochie
